title: MineWorldServerPack
body:
This is a build of mods for RP servers, which includes mods such as EmoteCraft, PlasmoVoice, and optimization mods. You can add the necessary plugins to your server, and play with this build, because it can improve your server!
### EmoteCraft
Create your own emotes in Minecraft.
### PlasmoVoice
A proximity voice chat mod with audio positioning and lots of features
### Wildfire's Female Gender Mod.
The Female Gender Mod introduces extra player model customization options, including a unique feature that adds a personalized touch to your avatar.
### Cosmetica
Free custom capes and cosmetics for Minecraft
### BetterAnvil
This mod allows you to see items that can be renamed so that the texture changes on the server. Everything is displayed in a convenient menu where everything is clear.
### Enhanced Block Entities
Reduce FPS lag with block entities, as well as customize them with resource packs.
### Very Many Players
A Fabric mod designed to improve server performance at high playercounts.
### Status Effect Bars
Adds customizable bars to the status effects overlay to show the remaining duration of effects.
### Mod Menu
Adds a mod menu to view the list of mods you have installed.
### More Culling
A mod that changes how multiple types of culling are handled in order to improve performance.
### Entity Culling
Using async path-tracing to hide Block-/Entities that are not visible.
### Perspective Mod Redux
360 degree third person view
### LambDynamicLights
A dynamic lights mod for Fabric.
### Memory Leak Fix
A mod that fixes random memory leaks for both the client and server.
### Cull Less Leaves
Cull leaves while looking hot!
### Fastload
Modifies how worlds are loaded to speed up loading times.
### Fast Items
Optimize item rendering by transforming item entities to 2D.
### Dynamic FPS
Improve performance when Minecraft is in the background.
### Stendhal
Stendhal is a client-side Fabric mod offering new and enhanced visual utilities for books, signs, anvil and the in-game chat.
### CIT Resewn
Re-implements MCPatcher's CIT (custom item textures from optifine resource packs).
### Debugify
Fixes Minecraft bugs found on the bug tracker.
### DashLoader
Launch at the speed of light.
### Starlight
Rewrites the light engine to fix lighting performance and lighting errors.
### Methane
Explosive optimisations for your favourite block game.
### FerriteCore
Memory usage optimizations.
### Sodium
A modern rendering engine for Minecraft which greatly improves performance.
### Lithium
No-compromises game logic/server optimization mod.
### Sodium Extra
Features that shouldn't be in Sodium.
### ImmediatelyFast
Speed up immediate mode rendering in Minecraft.
### Reese's Sodium Options
Alternative Options Menu for Sodium.
